evals.prompt: write a crypto tweet about Bitcoin
evals.expected_output: Searches for Bitcoin news, presents 3-5 tweet candidates in casual crypto voice, generates SDXL landscape 1344x768 image, saves draft.json
expectations: Performs at least one WebSearch for Bitcoin crypto news
Presents 3 or more numbered tweet candidates
Tweet style is casual/community voice, not corporate
Asks user to select a tweet before generating the image
Writes draft.json with version, generated_at, topic, tweet, image fields

evals.expected_output: Auto-discovers trending crypto news (no topic specified), presents tweet candidates
expectations: Performs WebSearch to find trending crypto topics (no hardcoded topic)
Presents 3 or more tweet candidates based on discovered news
Sets topic field in draft.json to the auto-detected trending subject

evals.prompt: write a tweet about Ethereum ETF approval
evals.expected_output: Searches specifically for Ethereum ETF news, tweets mention ETH or ETF, image prompt reflects the topic
expectations: At least one tweet candidate mentions ETH, Ethereum, or ETF
Image prompt relates to Ethereum or ETF themes
topic field in draft.json contains 'Ethereum ETF' or similar
